passes.title: Boston By Foot
passes.benefit_text: Admits up to 4 (adults or children) at half price per person.
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 (adults or children) at half price per person.

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text: Use this code for 50% off of up to 4 tickets to Spectacle or Georges Island.
source_phrases: Use this code for 50% off of up to 4 tickets to Spectacle or Georges Island.

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits up to 4 people at $5 off per person.
Not to be combined with other discounts; not valid for member pricing.
source_phrases: Each pass admits up to 4 people at $5 off per person.
Not to be combined with other discounts; not valid for member pricing.

passes.title: Concord Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price.
source_phrases: This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits 2 adults for free.  Children under 12 are always free.
source_phrases: This pass admits 2 adults for free.  Children under 12 are always free.

passes.title: Griffin Museum Of Photography
passes.benefit_text: Each pass admits 4 people (including at least one MA resident) at 50% off at all admission levels. This pass can be used for access to the Harvard Natural History Museum and the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology.
source_phrases: Each pass admits 4 people (including at least one MA resident) at 50% off at all admission levels. This pass can be used for access to the Harvard Natural History Museum and the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text: This pass gives patrons 50% off admission for up to 4 people.
source_phrases: This pass gives patrons 50% off admission for up to 4 people.

passes.title: The House Of Seven Gables
passes.benefit_text: Each pass provides admission for 2 people, for an admission of $10.00 per person. Admission is always free for anyone 18 or under. The ICA is closed Mondays, except for Monday holidays.
source_phrases: Each pass provides admission for 2 people, for an admission of $10.00 per person. Admission is always free for anyone 18 or under. The ICA is closed Mondays, except for Monday holidays.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text: Each pass provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free. This library pass does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum, you need to reserve a time slot with the Museum as well.
source_phrases: Each pass provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free. This library pass does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum, you need to reserve a time slot with the Museum as well.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount.
No pass is needed.
Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.
source_phrases: Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount.
No pass is needed.
Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass provides admission for up to four people to any Massachusetts Audubon Society Sanctuary for $2.00 per person.
source_phrases: This pass provides admission for up to four people to any Massachusetts Audubon Society Sanctuary for $2.00 per person.

passes.title: Mass Audubon
passes.benefit_text: The Massachusetts Parks Pass provides visitors unlimited day-use parking access to state park facilities within the DCR that charge a parking fee, with the exception of Pilgrim Memorial, Quabbin Reservoir Boat Launch Areas, the North Point lot in Cambridge, or any on-street DCR location that charges an hourly rate.
source_phrases: The Massachusetts Parks Pass provides visitors unlimited day-use parking access to state park facilities within the DCR that charge a parking fee, with the exception of Pilgrim Memorial, Quabbin Reservoir Boat Launch Areas, the North Point lot in Cambridge, or any on-street DCR location that charges an hourly rate.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text: Each pass admits up to 2 adults for $15.00/each and up to 4 youth at $10/each for  general admission .
source_phrases: Each pass admits up to 2 adults for $15.00/each and up to 4 youth at $10/each for  general admission .

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass, and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass, and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text: This coupon allows 50% off admission for up to 4 people to the New England Aquarium. Only applies to adult and child pricing. Valid only for Aquarium admission. This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
source_phrases: This coupon allows 50% off admission for up to 4 people to the New England Aquarium. Only applies to adult and child pricing. Valid only for Aquarium admission. This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
The pass is valid for one boat rental.  Passholder must present pass and photo ID at rental desk.
This includes: Any type of single kayak or paddleboard (1 person), double kayaks (2 adults), standard canoes (up to 3 adults, or 2 adults and 2 children), and tripper canoes (up to 5 adults).
Save time by filling out your waiver ahead of time: paddleboston.com/waiver.
Valid at all seven locations: Stoneham, Medford, Somerville, Boston, Cambridge, Newton, Waltham.
The Medford (Condon Shell) Location is not yet open for the season.  Opening weekend is based on water temperatures and weather conditions-- see paddleboston.com to check!
source_phrases: The pass is valid for one boat rental.  Passholder must present pass and photo ID at rental desk.
This includes: Any type of single kayak or paddleboard (1 person), double kayaks (2 adults), standard canoes (up to 3 adults, or 2 adults and 2 children), and tripper canoes (up to 5 adults).
Save time by filling out your waiver ahead of time: paddleboston.com/waiver.
Valid at all seven locations: Stoneham, Medford, Somerville, Boston, Cambridge, Newton, Waltham.
The Medford (Condon Shell) Location is not yet open for the season.  Opening weekend is based on water temperatures and weather conditions-- see paddleboston.com to check!

passes.title: Paddle Boston
passes.benefit_text: Each pass admits two people for $12.00 each. There is an additional fee for the Yin Yu Tang House.
source_phrases: Each pass admits two people for $12.00 each. There is an additional fee for the Yin Yu Tang House.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text: This program allows up to 6 guests at 50% off admission.
source_phrases: This program allows up to 6 guests at 50% off admission.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text: Pass allows free admission for 5 or fewer visitors. Limit one pass per party. There are no advance tickets or reservations available for the USS Constitution Museum. Entry will be based on a first come, first served system, which may result in a short wait to enter the Museum.
source_phrases: Pass allows free admission for 5 or fewer visitors. Limit one pass per party. There are no advance tickets or reservations available for the USS Constitution Museum. Entry will be based on a first come, first served system, which may result in a short wait to enter the Museum.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass provides admission for six people at the price of $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child. This pass is not valid for Zoo Lights.
source_phrases: This pass provides admission for six people at the price of $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child. This pass is not valid for Zoo Lights.
